creator: rich@FreeBSD.org.uk
text:
The iSiloBSD.zip file on ftp://ftp.isilo.com/pub/ has changed as of 14/05/2000

Logged as a pr incase I forget to prod Nik tomorrow.

Fix: 

Recreate checksum and replace ports/palm/isilo/files/md5 with new checksum (included below).

MD5 (iSiloBSD.zip) = 5563d24943b053cce754bcbb02a5e592
How-To-Repeat: try to install ports/palm/isilo and watch it fail.
